value.purpose: Creates the authenticated studio persistence client used by the live read and write paths.
value.notes: Hardened to return null instead of throwing when server-side auth client initialization fails.

value.purpose: Main operator dashboard home.
value.notes: Includes quick access into the new settings control center.

value.purpose: Primary shot workspace route.
value.notes: Hosts prompt builder, uploads, generation history, and workflow coach.

value.purpose: Structured prompt builder, generate flow, and review stage UI.
value.notes: One of the strongest existing product surfaces.

value.purpose: Private reference upload UI for shot assets.
value.notes: Supports image and short video reference uploads tied to shots.

value.purpose: Server-side asset upload endpoint for shot assets.
value.notes: Validates mime types and file sizes before private storage writes.

value.purpose: Refreshes Supabase auth state in middleware and protects dashboard routes.
value.notes: Hardened so bad cookies or Supabase session-refresh failures fall back to an anonymous response instead of throwing a production error page.

value.purpose: Handles BrandBuild auth email callback, verification, and magic-link redirects.
value.notes: Hardened so auth callback failures redirect back to login safely instead of falling through to the global error page.

value.purpose: Create generation jobs through the unified provider layer.
value.notes: Central path for launching provider runs from the dashboard.

value.purpose: Refresh generation status and provider outputs.
value.notes: Used for Sora refresh and generalized provider polling.

value.purpose: Normalized generation persistence, refresh, and asset sync.
value.notes: Core orchestration and storage bridge.

value.purpose: Server read model for dashboard data.
value.notes: Now builds grouped compare-outputs review data plus asset-version groups and campaign handoff packages, but still needs future tightening so live failures do not hide behind demo fallback too easily.

value.purpose: Primary compare-outputs workspace for grouped review and selection decisions.
value.notes: Rebuilt from a flat review list into a grouped compare console with filters, previews, and focused review detail.

value.purpose: Core product read-model and workflow types shared across dashboard surfaces.
value.notes: Expanded with comparison, version-group, and handoff-package types for the reviews and assets workspaces.

value.purpose: Assets route that now fronts the library, version-group, and handoff workflow.
value.notes: Keeps the existing /dashboard/assets route stable while feeding the richer workspace model.

value.purpose: Primary asset workspace UI for browsing outputs, reviewing version groups, and preparing handoff packages.
value.notes: Now owns three views: library, versions, and handoff/export preparation.

value.purpose: Sora provider adapter.
value.notes: Uses OpenAI video endpoints and still needs a validated live run.

value.purpose: Kling provider adapter.
value.notes: JWT-based live-capable adapter that still needs a validated run.

value.purpose: Higgsfield provider adapter.
value.notes: Reference-image-led live-capable adapter that still needs a validated run.

value.purpose: Product and integration readiness audit model.
value.notes: Feeds the control-center status page.

value.purpose: Control-center UI for readiness, blockers, and architecture gaps.
value.notes: New premium settings surface for product truth.

value.purpose: Branded auth email sending hook.
value.notes: Implemented in code but not fully live until Supabase dashboard setup is completed.

value.purpose: Core schema for campaigns, scenes, shots, prompt templates, generations, assets, reviews, tags, and activity log.
value.notes: Current production data foundation.

value.purpose: Public-site sticky header and primary access CTA.
value.notes: Public access buttons now route directly to /login so small-screen users do not depend on a protected /dashboard redirect for sign-in.

value.purpose: Public-site footer navigation and access links.
value.notes: Access links now route directly to /login to keep public sign-in behavior explicit and consistent with the header.

value.purpose: Reusable cinematic media surface for the public marketing experience.
value.notes: Decorative overlays, labels, and media layers are explicitly non-interactive so they cannot steal clicks from nearby CTAs.

value.purpose: BrandBuild public homepage and premium marketing experience.
value.notes: Hero and CTA decorative overlays are now non-interactive to keep public login and workflow CTAs reliably clickable.

value.purpose: Public-site control-room preview surface.
value.notes: Background glow layer is non-interactive so preview chrome cannot interfere with nearby click targets.

purpose: Canonical structured identity and repo-memory location for BrandBuild.
notes: Confirms the canonical local repo remains D:\\Playground\\brandbuild-online-repo.

purpose: Canonical current state, blockers, and next steps for BrandBuild.
notes: Now records the confirmed GitHub remote and the secondary clone created for future integration planning.

purpose: Canonical durable facts and cross-project knowledge for BrandBuild.
